response.justification: Well over the required six years of fullstack experience with a stack that closely matches the role: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes all appear in recent professional work, and current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience directly addresses the unusual AI agent development requirement. Strong testing culture (TDD, test-runner authorship, testing workshops) and demonstrated architecture ownership round out the fit, though Nest.js and Kotlin are not evidenced and much of the frontend history is Ember rather than React.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React and cloud/container work
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience, matching a rare requirement
Deep testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses)
concerns: No stated Nest.js experience; frontend history leans heavily on Ember over React
Kotlin absent and Python not listed despite multi-language requirement
Significant time invested in niche DLang ecosystem may mean less depth in the primary stack's latest practices
